title: GO1B1-01 golden-set scenario record
description: One labelled case. The golden set is a list of these (one JSON object per line in a .jsonl file).

scenario_id.description: Stable unique id. Never reuse or renumber — results are tracked by id over time.

tags.description: Routing labels. 'smoke' = runs on every PR; 'adversarial'/'edge' = full-run coverage gates.

source.description: Provenance: prod_form#, red_team#, incident#. Where this case came from.

rationale.description: Human justification for the label. Documentation, not asserted on.

input.description: The exact payload handed to the agent adapter. Mirrors a production return form.

acceptable_alternatives.description: Other actions that also pass. A safer action (e.g. HUMAN_REVIEW instead of AUTO_APPROVE) is often acceptable; a less safe one is not.

expected_evidence_trace.description: Asserts HOW the agent decided, not just the label. Catches right-answer-wrong-reasons.

must_consult.description: Tools/data the agent must have read.

must_apply_rules.description: Policy rules that must appear in the reasoning trace.

must_not_invoke.description: Actions that must NOT appear (e.g. issue_refund on a REJECT, admin_override from injected text).
